titlestmt.titleproper: Forest Hills Gardens (New York, N.Y.) records2495

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-05-09 00:15:04 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Forest Hills Gardens (New York, N.Y.) records
did.physdesc: Brochures, specifications, declarations of restrictions, and blueprints.
did.abstract: Brochures, specifications, declarations of restrictions, and blueprints of homes in Forest Hills Gardens.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Forest Hills Gardens is a planned residential community which was developed by the Russell Sage Foundation in 1908. Laid out on 175 acres in Queens, New York, the community's site plan was designed by Frederick Law Olmsted, Jr.; many of the houses were designed by Grosvenor Atterbury.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Brochures, specifications, declarations of restrictions, and blueprints of homes in Forest Hills Gardens.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIAL
relatedmaterial.p: See also Forest Hills Gardens Corporation Records, ( #2775).

list.head: Abbreviations used in the collection
list.item: 2nd, A. = Second Floor Plan, Attic Plan,
2nd, R. Pl. = Second Floor Plan, Roof Plan
B. 1st = Basement Floor Plan, First Floor Plan

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Forest Hills Gardens (New York, N.Y.) Records, #2495. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.extref: Link to a paper finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Project Description: Residence for Louis GalluciArchitect: Chas M. LobejagerDrawings List: Cellar Plan, First Floor Plan, Second Floor Plan, Roof Plan, South Elevation, West Elevation, North Elevation, East Elevation, Sketch of South (front) Elevation, End ElevationOther Details: Multiple copies of some drawings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Project Description: HouseArchitect: G. AtterburyDrawings List: Block PlanOther Details: Faces Road No. 38

scopecontent.p: Project Description: HousesArchitect: G. AtterburyDrawings List: Block PlanOther Details: Faces Road No. 38

scopecontent.p: Architect: G. AtterburyDrawings List: Block Plan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Architect: G. AtterburyDrawings List: Block Plan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Project Description: HouseArchitect: S. F. H. Company, Landscaping - Olmsted Bros., Group XII DrawingsDrawings List: Attic Plan, Plan of Flower Box, Elevations of Living, Dining and Bed rooms, Details of Lattice Work. Elevation of Dining room, Dining room Interior, Elevation of Entrance Hall, Section through Main Wing, Parquet Flooring, Details of Stairs, Staircase Section, Misc. Details, Staircase Hall Interior, 5 plates - Chimney Details, Details of Finished Fireplace, Dormer Windows, Living room Interior, Kitchen and Pantry Dressers, Details for China Closet, 2 plates - Hoods over Front and Rear Entrances, 2 plates - Details of steps, Grading Plan, Plan for location of Garage and Revision of Lot LinesOther Details: Corner Markwood Rd + Greenway north, 4 house group

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Architect: G. AtterburyDrawings List: Block PlanOther Details: Line A (street) almost across from Road 39

scopecontent.p: Project Description: Residence of F. E. Smith, Esq.Architect: Touchstone Architectural DepartmentDrawings List: Preliminary Sketches, Plot Plan, Cellar Plan, First Floor Plan, Second Floor Plan, Attic Plan, Front Elevation, Side Elevation, Rear Elevation, South Elevation, North Elevation Other Details: Multiple copies of some drawings, Note in Finding aid {Note: these comprise a set of pencil drawings (6 items) and blueprints of same (6 items), all stamped "To Be Returned to Grosvenor Atterbury….". Also, one blue print of a rather rough drawing of what appears to be the main floor; this is the only item marked "Touchstone". - kj, 5/7/80}
